---
title: "Portfolio"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <h1 data-aos="fade-up">Portfolio</h1>
  <p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">End-to-end systems I've designed and built - from national-scale health platforms to county government infrastructure.</p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="content-section">
  <div class="filter-bar" data-aos="fade-up">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="r">R</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="python">Python</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="shiny">Shiny</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="iot">IoT</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="api">API</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="docker">Docker</button>
  </div>

  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card tilt-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-tags="r shiny api docker react postgresql postgis">
      <div class="project-card-icon" style="font-size: 2.5rem;">&#x1F3E5;</div>
      <div class="project-card-body">
        <div class="metric">Designed for 54M Citizens &bull; 28 Endpoints <span class="private-badge">Private Repo</span></div>
        <h3><a href="sha-system.html">SHA Integrated Health System</a></h3>
        <p>Full-stack health insurance platform for Kenya's Social Health Authority, built during Data Science internship at @iLabAfrica, Strathmore University. 4-package architecture: R business logic, Plumber REST API, Golem/Shiny dashboard, React PWA. Isolation Forest fraud detection, PostGIS spatial analytics, M-Pesa integration.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">R</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Plumber API</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Golem/Shiny</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">React / TypeScript</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">PostgreSQL / PostGIS</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">Docker</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">JWT / RBAC</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card tilt-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="150" data-tags="r shiny docker postgresql postgis api">
      <div class="project-card-icon" style="font-size: 2.5rem;">&#x1F3DB;</div>
      <div class="project-card-body">
        <div class="metric">11 Modules &bull; 30 Wards &bull; KES Revenue Optimization <span class="private-badge">Private Repo</span></div>
        <h3><a href="smartlicensync.html">SmartLicenSync - Revenue Optimizer</a></h3>
        <p>Business permit and license management system for Kericho County Government, originated from the Innovate254 Hackathon (Homa Bay County). Built during Data Science internship at @iLabAfrica. Golem/Shiny with bs4Dash, PostgreSQL/PostGIS backend, M-Pesa payment processing, full audit trails, and role-based access control.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">R</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Golem/Shiny</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">bs4Dash</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">PostgreSQL / PostGIS</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">M-Pesa</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">Docker</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card tilt-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300" data-tags="r python shiny api iot docker">
      <div class="project-card-icon" style="font-size: 2.5rem;">&#9728;&#65039;</div>
      <div class="project-card-body">
        <div class="metric">Sub-$100 &bull; ASAE S580.1 Compliant <span class="private-badge">Private Repo</span></div>
        <h3><a href="solar-cooker.html">Solar Cooker IoT Testing Platform</a></h3>
        <p>MSc thesis - open-source IoT data acquisition unit that replaces $10K+ lab-grade equipment. ESP32 with custom PCB, Python circuit simulation pipeline, R Plumber API, and Shiny dashboard for real-time performance analysis.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">ESP32</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">MicroPython</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Python / PySpice</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">R Shiny</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">Plumber API</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">KiCad</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">Docker</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
